title: helianthemum variabile var. cinereum
intro: Helianthemum variabile var. cinereum, also known as Purple Rockrose or Purple Rock Cress, is a flowering plant species in the family Cistaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, making it a valuable resource for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Helianthemum variabile var. cinereum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
